name: Sociedad Quimica y Minera S.A.
summary: Sociedad Quimica y Minera S.A. (SQM) is a Chilean company engaged in the production and distribution of specialty plant nutrients, lithium and its derivatives, iodine and its derivatives, potassium chloride, and other industrial chemicals. The company extracts natural resources and processes them into various products, serving diverse industries globally. SQM is headquartered in Santiago, Chile.
